care.soil_types: Soil with loose texture or soil with specific nutrients
care.fertilizer_type: Dilute fertilizers following instructions, apply 1-2 times monthly
care.tips: Need pruning frequently, remove sprouts from the roots and some branches and leaves timely

description: Eucalyptus globulus, commonly known as southern blue gum or blue gum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is a tall, evergreen tree endemic to southeastern Australia. This Eucalyptus species has mostly smooth bark, juvenile leaves that are whitish and waxy on the lower surface, glossy green, lance-shaped adult leaves, glaucous, ribbed flower buds arranged singly or in groups of three or seven in leaf axils, white flowers and woody fruit.
